videos.title: How to Build a Landing Page with HTML & CSS
videos.description: Step-by-step tutorial on building a complete landing page from scratch using HTML5 and CSS3.

videos.title: Landing Page Design Principles
videos.description: Learn the key design principles behind high-converting landing pages, including layout, typography, and color theory.

videos.title: Responsive Landing Page with Flexbox and Grid
videos.description: Build a fully responsive landing page using CSS Flexbox and Grid with a mobile-first approach.

videos.title: CSS Animations for Landing Pages
videos.description: Add smooth CSS animations and transitions to your landing page for better user engagement.

videos.title: Landing Page Optimization for Conversions
videos.description: Learn how to optimize your landing pages for higher conversion rates with A/B testing and UX best practices.
